title: RGKMC Kolkata Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline For 07 Posts
shortInfo: The R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata (RGKMC Kolkata) has officially announced the Senior Resident (Non-Bonded) Contractual Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website, rgkarmch.org. Candidates who meet the age criteria of not exceeding 45 years and hold qualifications such as MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline can now submit their applications up to 03 June 2026. The walk-in interview will be held on 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

basic_details.job_title: RGKMC Kolkata Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline For 07 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata (RGKMC Kolkata) has officially announced the Senior Resident (Non-Bonded) Contractual Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website, rgkarmch.org. Candidates who meet the age criteria of not exceeding 45 years and hold qualifications such as MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline can now submit their applications up to 03 June 2026. The walk-in interview will be held on 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 45 years as on date of appointment.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years (as on date of appointment)

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: MBBS MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline from a recognised university of India.

selection_process: Academic Qualification Performance before the interview board Walk-in Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RGKMC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Senior Resident (Non-Bonded) Contractual posts at R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata is 03 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the RGKMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the RGKMC Senior Resident (Non-Bonded) Contractual posts will be held on 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Non-Bonded) Contractual positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 45 years as on the date of appointment.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attend a walk-in interview with their filled application form and required documents at the office of the Principal, R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Senior Residents?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Anaesthesiology, Microbiology, Paediatric Surgery, Plastic Surgery, Ophthalmology, and General Surgery.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata located?
faq.answer: R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata is located at 1, Kshudiram Bose Road, Kolkata, West Bengal 700004.
